message:
test: variant-dispatch Display coverage for 3 modules (13 paths)

- ByteCompressionError: all 3 variants + std::error::Error trait
  (InvalidInput, DecompressionFailed, TrainingFailed) — zero tests
  existed
- TriggerCategory: all 6 variants (Error, Warning, Completion,
  Progress, TestResult, Custom) — zero tests existed
- HotReloadResult: all 4 Display paths (no changes, changes only,
  forbidden only, both) — zero tests existed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
